# FTRL — task instructions (placeholder)

> **Placeholder.** Replace with PaperBench's per-paper / global instructions
> (Figures 13 and 14 of the PaperBench paper) when wiring in the real bundle.

## Goal

Replicate the experiments in this paper from scratch. The submission is the
contents of the working directory you built. A `reproduce.sh` script at the
repository root must, when executed in the standard PaperBench Docker image,
produce a `reproduce.log` and any artifacts the rubric checks for.

## Allowed / disallowed

- You MAY browse the web and install packages.
- You MAY use HuggingFace and the OpenAI API key provided.
- You MUST NOT consult the original paper's source repository or any blocked
  URLs listed in `blacklist.txt`.
- You MUST NOT exfiltrate the rubric or addendum into your submission.
